text: 331 > N & & F - P o N Ry T A T OV W R Y VY (O 205 250 605 50 K0 s 4 0SB 505 28 8 (O Messenger!) Tell people: 'If you indeed love Allah, follow me, and Allah will love you and will forgive you your sins. Allah is All-Forgiving, All-Compassionate.
